allOf.description: Configuration for a Google BigQuery logging endpoint.

project_id.description: The Google Cloud project ID where the BigQuery dataset is located.

dataset.description: The BigQuery dataset to send logs to.

table.description: The BigQuery table to send logs to.

user.description: The Google Cloud service account email address.

secret_key.description: The Google Cloud service account private key.

template_suffix.description: A BigQuery table name suffix for date-partitioned tables.

account_name.description: The name of the Google Cloud Platform service account.
